title: Lose You to Love Me
why_this_song: Lose You to Love Me by Selena Gomez (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I needed to lose you to find me"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I needed to lose you to find me"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "And you let it burn"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I needed to hate you to love me, yeah"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Then you tore me down and now it's showing"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "needed" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "needed" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lose" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lose" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I put you first and you adored it

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Lose You to Love Me", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Lose You to Love Me", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Lose You to Love Me" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Lose You to Love Me" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Lose You to Love Me" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Lose You to Love Me", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
